dict.string: SmartNotes tags your notes with your current location so you can rediscover them when you return to the same place.
SmartNotes uses background location to notify you when you return to a place where you have saved notes.
SmartNotes records your voice to transcribe and save notes hands-free.
SmartNotes uses on-device speech recognition to convert your recordings into searchable text.
SmartNotes can create Reminders from action items it detects in your notes.
